rule: The next run must log every discovered candidate event whether accepted or rejected.
reason: Measures source attrition and selection bias.

rule: Expanded admissible panel must contain at least 30 events before any rerun.
Target panel is 30-50 events; stopping below 50 requires a blocker reason.
reason: Prevents stopping when the panel looks favorable.

rule: At least 35 percent of accepted rows must be non-success unresolved or negative if available.
At least 5 rows must involve delisted acquired renamed or date-aware mapping complications if discoverable.
No accepted row may lack pre-event proof dated before event date.
Rows with partial PIT proof stay exploratory_only and cannot enter the micro-backtest rerun.
30d 60d and 90d windows remain frozen labeled diagnostics.
reason: Prevents choosing the previous best window.

rule: No market data joins are allowed during expansion.
reason: Separates event construction from performance inspection.

rule: No parameter or source search may be guided by realized stock returns.
